test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient scoped coverage: tactical source-contract tests verify seeker activation routing, visibility rules, and action-button lifecycle, GUI checks cover activation-phase button layout/source contracts, and rerun TacticalTests and GuiTests passed.
documentation_accuracy_summary: UsersGuide.md and DesignNotes.md accurately describe the activation-phase inactive-only rendering, normal-phase active-only rendering, per-seeker activation rows, and the Seeker Activation Done flow implemented in FBattleBoard and FBattleDisplay.
